title: Slay PDF pages
description: Canonical Slay PDF app, tool and guide pages for local PDF editing.

items.title: Slay PDF - Free Local PDF Editor & Adobe Acrobat Alternative
items.summary: Slay PDF is a free local PDF editor and Adobe Acrobat alternative for splitting, merging, signing, posterising, resizing and editing PDFs entirely in your browser.
items.content_text: Slay PDF is a free local PDF editor and Adobe Acrobat alternative for splitting, merging, signing, posterising, resizing and editing PDFs entirely in your browser.

items.summary: Browse Slay PDF tools: merge, split, sign, rotate, crop, resize, redact, compress, OCR, extract text, export images, fill forms and password protect PDFs locally.

items.title: Adobe Acrobat Alternative - Slay PDF

items.title: Privacy - Slay PDF
items.summary: Slay PDF privacy details: PDFs and edits stay in the browser, active workspaces use local browser storage, and export passwords are never saved.
items.content_text: Slay PDF privacy details: PDFs and edits stay in the browser, active workspaces use local browser storage, and export passwords are never saved.
